name: Barbell Front Squat
shortDescription: Squat variation with barbell held at the front rack position, targeting the quadriceps.
instructions: Stand upright, barbell resting across front shoulders, elbows high. Descend into a squat while keeping torso upright and elbows elevated. Push through your heels to return to standing, maintaining bar balance throughout.
steps: Rack barbell at collarbone level, elbows up.
Descend into squat keeping torso upright.
Lower until thighs are parallel to floor.
Drive up through heels to stand.
breathing: Inhale when lowering, exhale standing up.
